basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) Field Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website main.icmr.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR NIHR Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Admissible for SC/ST, OBC, Government Employees, Departmental Candidates, Ex-servicemen, and Experienced and skilled persons for other research projects.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences with 2 years' experience in community-based health projects, preferably NCD or surveillance studies OR Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences.
qualification.details: Field Supervisor: Bachelor's degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences with 2 years' experience in community-based health projects, preferably NCD or surveillance studies. OR Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (wherever applicable) Merit list based on Written Test and Interview performance

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Field Supervisor at ICMR - National Institute of Health Research.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Field Supervisor position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: A Bachelor's degree in Public Health, Nursing, Life Sciences, Social Work, or Allied Health Sciences with 2 years of experience, or a Postgraduate degree in the same fields is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 35 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Field Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered is Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICMR - National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original certificates for verification along with one set of self-attested photocopies of all relevant documents.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
